creator: hm@hcs.de
text:
In http://www.freeBSD.org/handbook/install-hw.html the following
	cards are mentioned to be supported in 4.x, but they are only
	supported in 3.x:

		AVM Fritz!Card PCMCIA 
		AVM Fritz!Card PnP 
		ITK ix1 micro 
		ITK ix1 micro V.3
		
	There is a chance that they might be supported in fut

Fix: 

Mark them as unsupported for FreeBSD >= 4.x in the handbook.
